tasks.description: Fix `createGenerationTask` in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/generation.ts` to use `family`/`input` API format. Update `CreateGenerationTaskArgs` to add `reference_image_url`, `reference_mode`, `shot_id`, `model_name`, `image_urls` fields. Refactor the request body (lines 68-81) to dispatch: image_generation family with reference_mode/style_reference_image/subject_reference_image for transfers, travel_between_images family with image_urls/base_prompts/segment_frames/frame_overlap for i2v. Remove the `taskType !== 'image_generation'` guard (line 48-49). Default model_name to 'qwen-image' when reference_mode is set. Keep backward compat for plain prompt+count calls.

Create `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/clips.ts` with three functions: (1) `resolveClipGenerationIds` — takes clips, asset registry, and timeline config, resolves each clip_id → asset key → generationId. (2) `findShotForGenerations` — queries `shot_generations` table, returns shared shot_id if ALL generation IDs belong to the same shot, else null. (3) `createShotWithGenerations` — calls `insert_shot_at_position` RPC, inserts into `shot_generations` for each generationId, returns new shot_id. Also extend the `SupabaseAdmin` type in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/types.ts` (lines 42-53) to support insert and multi-eq query patterns needed by these functions. Keep clips.ts under ~80 lines.

Add `create_task` tool schema to `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tool-schemas.ts` as a second entry in TIMELINE_AGENT_TOOLS. Properties: task_type (enum: text-to-image, style-transfer, subject-transfer, scene-transfer, image-to-video), prompt (string), reference_image_urls (array of strings), count (number), shot_name (string). Required: task_type, prompt. Also update the `run` tool description (line 15) to remove `generate` from the command list.

Wire `create_task` tool calls in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/loop.ts`. Refactor `extractCommands` (line 70) into `extractToolCalls` that collects ALL tool calls regardless of name, not just `run`. Split execution block (lines 215-257) into two paths: `run` (existing executeCommand flow) and `create_task` (new handler). The create_task handler must: (a) map task_type to reference_mode (style-transfer→style, etc.) or to travel_between_images family for i2v, (b) take reference_image_urls directly from LLM args, (c) call resolveClipGenerationIds to get generation IDs for shot logic, (d) call findShotForGenerations to check shared shot, (e) if no shared shot and shot_name provided, call createShotWithGenerations, (f) call createGenerationTask with resolved params. Format tool results using existing createToolTurn helper with tool_name 'create_task'.

Update system prompt in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/prompts.ts` — add a section after existing run command examples (around line 37) explaining create_task usage with examples for each task_type (style-transfer, subject-transfer, scene-transfer, image-to-video, text-to-image). Keep concise with examples. Also in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/command-parser.ts`: keep the generate command parser (lines 176-185) working for backward compat, but update the error message (line 187) to reference create_task as the generation tool instead of generate.

Deploy the updated edge function and run verification. Deploy with: `npx supabase functions deploy ai-timeline-agent --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc`. Check TypeScript compilation succeeds for all changed files. Review git diff to confirm: (1) no out-of-scope changes, (2) existing timeline editing commands unaffected, (3) old generate command backward compat preserved, (4) no files over ~300 lines, (5) debt watch items not worsened. Run any existing tests in the supabase/functions directory. Write a short throwaway script that imports and exercises the key functions (resolveClipGenerationIds, findShotForGenerations, createGenerationTask with new format) to verify they compile and have correct signatures, then delete it.

watch_items: DEBT: task-system-integration — create_generation_task was already flagged as underspecified against the actual task family system. T1 directly addresses this by switching to family/input format, but verify the exact shape matches what create-task edge function expects.

DEBT: tool-error-propagation — the new create_task handler in the loop must NOT use a blanket catch that silently downgrades DB/persistence failures. Propagate errors properly so sessions get HTTP 500 on real failures.

DEBT: conflict-resolution — the agent creates tasks that eventually produce timeline updates via realtime. Ensure the task creation path doesn't introduce new conflict scenarios with dirty local edits.
Assumption: asset registry loaded in loadTimelineState contains generationId on asset entries. Verify this is actually populated before relying on it in resolveClipGenerationIds.
Assumption: SelectedClipPayload carries clip_id + url + media_type. The LLM receives these URLs in context and picks from them for reference_image_urls. No frontend changes needed.
Assumption: Only qwen-image and z-image support reference params (imageGeneration.ts:102-104). Defaulting to qwen-image when reference_mode is set.
Risk: The extractCommands→extractToolCalls refactor in loop.ts changes how ALL tool calls are parsed. Must not break existing run tool handling.
Risk: travel_between_images defaults (segment_frames=[49], frame_overlap=[2]) are hardcoded for MVP. If these don't match what the resolver expects, tasks will fail.

Plan question (unanswered): Should shot_id be passed to the task so generated outputs auto-link via DB trigger? Executor should check if create-task edge function supports shot_id in input and pass it if so.
Plan question (unanswered): i2v advanced params (motion settings, phase config, lora) use defaults for MVP. No agent-controllable parameters beyond prompt and image_urls.

sense_checks.question: Does the refactored createGenerationTask produce a request body matching the create-task edge function's expected family/input schema for both image_generation and travel_between_images families?

Does resolveClipGenerationIds correctly traverse clip_id → config.clips[].asset → registry.assets[assetKey].generationId, and does findShotForGenerations correctly return null when generations span multiple shots?
Does the create_task tool schema have reference_image_urls as an array (not singular string), and has 'generate' been removed from the run tool's command list description?

Does the refactored extractToolCalls still correctly handle existing 'run' tool calls, and does the create_task handler properly dispatch to both image_generation and travel_between_images families based on task_type?
Does the system prompt include concrete examples for all 5 task types, and does the old generate command in command-parser.ts still parse correctly for backward compat?
Does the edge function deploy succeed, TypeScript compile cleanly, and git diff confirm no out-of-scope changes or debt watch item regressions?

meta_commentary:
Execution guidance:

1. **Start by reading the current state of all target files** before editing. The plan references specific line numbers that may have drifted. Key files: `tools/generation.ts`, `loop.ts`, `tool-schemas.ts`, `prompts.ts`, `command-parser.ts`, `types.ts`.

2. **T1 is the critical-path blocker.** The existing generate command is broken (old API format). Fix this first and verify the request body shape matches what `supabase/functions/create-task/index.ts` actually expects — don't trust the plan's example blindly, read the edge function's input parsing.

3. **T2 needs real DB schema knowledge.** Before writing `findShotForGenerations` and `createShotWithGenerations`, check the actual `shot_generations` table schema and the `insert_shot_at_position` RPC signature. The plan describes the intent but the exact column names and RPC params must come from the DB.

4. **T4 is the riskiest task** — it refactors the core agent loop. The `extractCommands` function is load-bearing for all existing timeline commands. Test that run tool calls still work identically after the refactor. The plan says to change the filter at line 70 from `fn.name !== "run"` — verify this is still the current logic before changing it.

5. **Parallelism:** T1, T2, T3 are independent and can be executed in parallel (or any order). T4 depends on all three. T5 depends on T4. T6 is final verification.

6. **Edge function deployment** requires `npx supabase functions deploy ai-timeline-agent --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc`. The Deno runtime may have different import conventions than Node — watch for this in the new clips.ts file.

7. **The SupabaseAdmin type extension (part of T2)** should be minimal. Don't try to make it fully generic — just add what clips.ts needs.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Step 1: Fix createGenerationTask to use family/input format
Step 4: Wire create_task tool calls in the loop
Step 6: Update SupabaseAdmin type for new queries
Step 7: Remove generate from command parser advertising

validation.completeness_notes: All 8 plan steps mapped. Steps 2+6 consolidated into T2 (clip utilities + type extension are tightly coupled). Steps 5+7 consolidated into T5 (both are small prompt/parser updates). Step 8 (manual testing) maps to T6 (deploy + verify). No gaps.
